title: Uttera benchmark result
description: Canonical shape for a single benchmark run. Produced by benchmarks/bench.py and consumed by benchmarks/results/. Enforces the PROTOCOL.md metadata requirements so no result can be published without the full provenance block.

schema_version.description: Semver of this schema. Bump minor for additions, major for breaking shape changes.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this bench run (UUIDv4 recommended).

run_started_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the bench started.

gpu.description: Free-form GPU description including model + VRAM.

cuda.description: CUDA toolkit version as reported by nvidia-smi / nvcc.

shared_gpu.description: True if other workloads were sharing the GPU during the bench. Use false only when the node was isolated.

cold_start.description: True if the service process was started specifically for this bench (no prior traffic).

tag.description: Git tag if the commit is tagged.

protocol_doc.description: Reference to PROTOCOL.md at a specific commit, e.g. uttera/uttera-infra@<sha>:benchmarks/PROTOCOL.md

config.description: Engine tuning (max_num_seqs, gpu_memory_utilization, dtype, etc.). Free-form; include every knob that was not its library default.

id.description: One of the canonical IDs in PROTOCOL.md §1 (librispeech-test-clean, commonvoice-es-test, fleurs-multilingual, uttera-stt-internal, uttera-tts-40w, ljspeech-test, uttera-tts-internal) or a new canonical ID you add there first.

total_audio_seconds.description: Total audio duration across all clips. Zero is allowed for TTS corpora because the corpus is text — there is no input audio.

sha256_manifest.description: SHA-256 of a newline-sorted list of (clip_path, sha256) pairs — binds the result to the exact bytes used.

command.description: Exact command line that produced the result. Must be re-runnable verbatim.

raw_csv_path.description: Relative path (from this JSON file) to the per-request CSV with columns: clip_id,audio_seconds,latency_ms,status,route

rtf_single_mean.description: Mean of per-request (audio_seconds / latency_s). Only meaningful for the latency profile.

routes.description: Histogram of X-Route header values (hotcold sends HOT / COLD-POOL / COLD-POOL>HOT). Empty for backends that don't set it.

sustained_p95_drift.description: Array of p95 latency (ms) measured at 1-minute buckets. Present only for sustained profile.

notes.description: Free-form human-readable observations: anomalies, environmental changes, anything a future reader should know.
